notes: Run each scenario in a fresh context with the loovie MCP server connected. Trigger scenarios assert which skill activates; output scenarios assert observable behavior, not vibes.

scenarios.prompt: Make me a 30 second Loovie video about a dragon who learns to bake bread
assertions: create_project is called before any generation tool
Credit cost is quoted in credits, never in dollars

scenarios.prompt: I have a story idea I want to turn into a short AI video
assertions: The agent asks for a title/brief or uses the supplied one before creating the project

scenarios.prompt: Export my latest Loovie project and give me the download link
Add captions to clip 2 of my beach project
Simulate: a video generation job returns status 'timeout' from get_job
assertions: The agent treats timeout as terminal and stops polling
The agent surfaces the error and asks before starting a new job
The agent offers both approval paths: mobile push notification and in-chat via approve_pending_spend
The agent continues polling after approval
